items.title: Directions
items.text:
East Leake Pavilion, Costock Road, East Leake, LE12 6LY.
What3Words: ///gently.primed.diplomats

items.title: Car Parking
items.text: Car sharing is advised as there is limited parking on site. There is an overflow car park opposite the ground and on Cornflower Way, with additional car parks in the village a short walk away. Please do not park on the pavement or grass verges on the surrounding housing estates.

items.title: Club Colours
items.text: Orange, white and black — the proud colours of East Leake FC. Our Nike home kit features an orange shirt with black shorts.

items.title: Kitchen & Bar
items.text: Hot and cold food and drinks are available from 9am on matchdays. Come down early and enjoy the atmosphere at the Pavilion.

items.title: Our Pitches
items.text: The ground features 8 pitches of various sizes catering for 11v11, 9v9, and 7v7 football — with dugouts, changing rooms and container storage on site.

items.title: Dogs & Policies
items.text: No dogs are permitted at the ground except assistance dogs. We are an FA Charter Standard and FA Respect club — Proud For All.
